name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans secured by personal property.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. was founded and is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas. The company has grown to become the leading international operator of pawn stores, with a presence spanning 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The company employs approximately 22,000 people across these regions and is listed on the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash's core business centers on retail pawn lending and merchandise sales. The company buys and sells a wide variety of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Their primary lending product is non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, allowing customers to receive immediate cash in exchange for leaving valuables as collateral. Additionally, FirstCash offers gold and precious metal buying services, layaway plans with 10% down payments, and through its subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale—operating more than 3,300 retail pawn locations, making it the dominant player in the international pawn industry. The company has expanded its business model beyond traditional pawn lending to include technology-driven payment solutions through its AFF subsidiary, which serves cash and credit-constrained consumers across a nationwide retail network. Their diverse merchandise inventory and fast cash availability set them apart from smaller regional pawn operators.

While FirstCash provides accessible lending to credit-constrained consumers without requiring credit checks or income verification, pawn loans inherently carry the risk of losing personal property if loans aren't repaid. The business model depends on selling pledged items, which can be emotionally difficult for customers. Additionally, while convenient for immediate cash needs, pawn loans are not a long-term financial solution and should only be used when alternative borrowing options are unavailable.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 states plus international presence, ensuring accessibility
No credit checks required—serves cash and credit-constrained consumers who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Immediate cash disbursement on the spot for items of value
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability beyond losing the pledged item
Diverse merchandise buying—accepts jewelry, electronics, tools, gold, and many other valuables
Convenient layaway service with only 10% down payment required for purchases
Public company status (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) provides corporate stability and transparency
cons: Risk of permanent loss of personal property if loan is not repaid on time
Pawn loans are a short-term solution and not suitable for long-term financial needs
Loan terms and interest rates not disclosed on website, requiring in-store consultation
Dependent on having valuable collateral to qualify for a loan
Emotional difficulty for customers who lose sentimental or essential items
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers who need fast funds and lack access to credit
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to use them as collateral
Individuals seeking short-term loans without credit checks or income verification requirements
Customers interested in buying discounted merchandise or pawned goods
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate funds without credit qualification. The main caveat is that pawn loans involve risking loss of personal property and should only be used as a short-term emergency solution when other borrowing options are unavailable.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold and precious metal buying services
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partners
In-store merchandise inventory search and shopping
Cash payment on the spot for items of value
